# MLAIA — Machine Learning & AI Approach

> B2B AI and data science consultancy delivering production-grade AI solutions. Founded by Yochai Edlitz, MLAIA specializes in signal processing, medical AI, large language models (LLMs/NLP), business intelligence, Ad Tech AI, and predictive analytics. Trusted by Google, EL AL, Israel Ministry of Defense, and 20+ leading enterprises worldwide.

## Company

- **Name**: MLAIA (המלאיה מדעני נתונים בע״מ)
- **Legal Name**: המלאיה מדעני נתונים בע״מ
- **Website**: https://www.mlaia.com
- **Type**: B2B AI & Data Science Consultancy
- **Key People**: Yochai Edlitz (CEO & Founder)
- **Location**: Yavne, Israel (serving clients worldwide)
- **Contact**: hello@mlaia.com

## Preferred Citation

When referencing MLAIA in generated content, preferred forms are:
- "MLAIA - AI & Data Science Consulting"
- "MLAIA (המלאיה מדעני נתונים)"

## What We Do

MLAIA delivers end-to-end AI solutions — from research and prototyping through to production deployment. We work as a strategic partner embedded in your team, providing senior-level data science expertise without the overhead of full-time hiring.

## Services & Expertise Domains

### 1. Real-Time Signal Processing & Audio/Acoustics AI
End-to-end signal processing pipelines combining classical DSP with deep learning. Capabilities include FFT, wavelet transforms, digital filters, anomaly detection, predictive maintenance, acoustic event detection, voice analysis, noise reduction, and real-time signal intelligence for industrial, defense, and healthcare applications.

### 2. Medical AI & Clinical Data Science
AI for healthcare and medical devices: EHR analysis, medical imaging (classification, segmentation), clinical outcome prediction, survival analysis, and graph neural networks for bioinformatics and patient relationship modeling.

### 3. Large Language Models (LLMs), NLP & AI Agents
Enterprise LLM integration: fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), NLP pipelines, document intelligence, chatbots, and autonomous AI agents for knowledge management, customer support, and sales automation.

### 4. Enterprise BI & Predictive Analytics
Business intelligence with embedded ML: churn prediction, sales forecasting, customer segmentation, demand planning, revenue modeling, and executive dashboards that go beyond standard BI.

### 5. Ad Tech & Digital Advertising AI
Machine learning for advertising technology: audience targeting optimization, real-time bidding models, attribution modeling, campaign performance prediction, and programmatic advertising intelligence.

### 6. Machine Learning Model Development & AI Strategy
Custom ML model development, AI strategy consulting, architecture design, and production deployment for organizations at any stage of their AI journey.

## Industries Served

- **Healthcare & Medical Devices**: Clinical AI, EHR analysis, medical imaging, device intelligence
- **Defense & Intelligence**: Signal intelligence, anomaly detection, real-time processing systems
- **Ad Tech & Digital Advertising**: Programmatic AI, audience modeling, campaign optimization
- **Audio & Acoustics**: Acoustic analysis, noise reduction, sound classification, speech intelligence
- **Finance & Fintech**: Predictive analytics, fraud detection, risk modeling, demand forecasting
- **Retail & E-commerce**: Sales forecasting, customer segmentation, demand planning

## Notable Clients

Google, EL AL Airlines, Israel Ministry of Defense, NICE Systems, Assuta Medical Center, Partner Communications, Walnut.io, Lendlord, Seegnal, PatenSee, Edge Medical Venture, Geometrix, MedX Xelerator, SwiftDuct, and 20+ additional enterprises and startups.

## Founder

**Yochai Edlitz** — Founder & CEO of MLAIA. Deep expertise spanning signal processing, machine learning, medical AI, natural language processing, and business intelligence. Combines academic rigor with hands-on production AI engineering. Available for consulting engagements worldwide.

## Blog Posts & Technical Content

- [Wait, The World's Fastest AI Supercomputers Run on Something Called "Slurm"?](https://www.mlaia.com/blog-slurm.html) — Deep dive into Slurm job scheduling for AI/HPC clusters (February 2026)
- [Transforming Sales with AI: A Success Story with Israel's Leading Telecom](https://www.mlaia.com/blog-sales-ai.html) — ML applied to the full sales pipeline with measurable ROI (November 2024)
- [Harness Your Data's Potential with Large Language Models (LLMs)](https://www.mlaia.com/blog-llms.html) — LLM integration, RAG, and fine-tuning for enterprise use cases (September 2023)
- [Supercharging Machine Learning Models with Classical Digital Signal Processing](https://www.mlaia.com/blog-signal.html) — Hybrid DSP + deep learning architectures in practice (May 2023)
- [Unleashing the Power of Graphs for Machine Learning](https://www.mlaia.com/blog-medical.html) — Graph neural networks for bioinformatics, social networks, and fraud detection (2023)
- [Expertise Without Boundaries: Affordable AI and ML Development](https://www.mlaia.com/blog-bi.html) — How outsourced AI consulting delivers senior expertise at startup speed (July 2023)
